evals.prompt: I want to build a hidden entrance to my base using pistons, nothing too crazy just a simple one
evals.expected_output: Should recommend a 2x2 flush piston door, generate an HTML viewer with layer-by-layer build guide, explain it in beginner-friendly terms, and mention which direction to face when building

evals.prompt: How do comparators work? I don't get the subtract mode at all
evals.expected_output: Should explain comparators clearly for a beginner — compare mode vs subtract mode with concrete examples. Should NOT generate an HTML viewer since this is a question, not a build request. Should mention container reading as a practical use case

evals.prompt: I need to sort my items automatically, I have too many chests and its getting out of hand
evals.expected_output: Should recommend the standard hopper-based item sorter, generate an HTML viewer with the build, specify exact hopper slot contents (41 target items + 4 renamed sticks), explain overflow protection, and mention that non-stackable items can't be sorted this way
